description: RadioMaster Pocket (EdgeTX joystick mode, USB VID 0x1209 / PID 0x4F54) as the browser Gamepad API exposes it: a non-standard mapping whose axes follow the EdgeTX AETR channel order (0 = aileron/roll on the right-stick X gimbal, 1 = elevator/pitch on the right-stick Y gimbal, 2 = throttle on the left-stick Y gimbal, 3 = rudder/yaw on the left-stick X gimbal, Mode 2). Routing turns that into canonical slots: slot0 <- rudder, slot1 <- throttle (inverted: a raised throttle gimbal reads +1 from the browser, while canonical left-stick-up is -1), slot2 <- aileron, slot3 <- elevator (inverted for the same reason). The AETR order is carried over from the shared registry's HID capture, whose stick assignment was inferred from resting values, not verified stick-by-stick; a physical-unit pass must confirm it before this profile is relied on for flight.
